nasb.text: In the second year of Joash son of Joahaz king of Israel, Amaziah the son of Joash king of Judah became king.

esv.text: In the second year of Joash the son of Joahaz, king of Israel, Amaziah the son of Joash, king of Judah, began to reign.

cnv.text: 以色列王約哈斯的兒子約阿施在位第二年，猶大王約阿施的兒子亞瑪謝登基作王。

ccb.text: 以色列王约哈斯的儿子约阿施执政第二年，犹大王约阿施的儿子亚玛谢登基。
